AddressInfo.Title: Innogy Public Charging Station(AC).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: @ parking lot of the policlinics,otherwise payed,it is not clearly stated,EVs @ the charging station r excluded from parking payment,i just assume,they should be excluded from payment.Parking bays r in line.

Connections.Comments: Right-side connector & right RFID reader. L-N voltage mentioned(L-L voltage is 400V).
Left-side connector is not functional due to dead left RFID reader. Do not use,Your cable may stuck.

GeneralComments: Charging station has no display.Connect the cable,then use Your RFID card for authentication by holding it @ the right-side RFID reader,till LED above the right socket turns blue. Colors meaning: Dark blue=idle,ready to connect;Green=connected,ready to authenticate or charging finished(not charging);Light Blue=Authenthication successful,charging;Red=Error. Do not use the left-side socket,its RFID reader is dead(the left reader).
